rawAssistant: Tomorrow'll be a busy day 'round here. Can't tighten anything till then, but I reckon you should make sure those lanterns are secure on the planks for good measure. Last gale came through like a scythe and near wiped out our lighting. Don't want no accidents while you're makin' your way north.
